---
name: Clinical correction
about: Report a discrepancy between an implemented algorithm and its cited source, or a missing clinical caveat
title: 'Clinical correction: <condition> — <brief description>'
labels: ['clinical-review-needed']
assignees: ''
---

**Condition:** `conditions/<name>/`

**Module and line(s) of concern:**

<File path and line numbers if applicable.>

**What the code currently does:**

<Quote or describe the implemented logic.>

**What the source says:**

<Quote or paraphrase the source, with citation.>

**Citation:**

<Author Year, Journal Volume(Issue):Pages. PMID/DOI.>

**Patient population this affects:**

<Who would be helped or harmed by the correction.>

**Proposed fix (optional):**

<If you have a specific change in mind.>
